attributes.title: AI研判总数
attributes.visState: {"title": "AI研判总数", "type": "metric", "aggs": [{"id": "1", "enabled": true, "type": "count", "schema": "metric", "params": {}}], "params": {"addTooltip": false, "addLegend": false, "style": {"bgColor": true, "bgFill": "#E8F4FD", "fontSize": "22pt", "labelColor": {"mode": "text"}, "subText": "条", "color": "#2980B9"}, "useColors": false}}

attributes.title: 受攻击目标数
attributes.visState: {"title": "受攻击目标数", "type": "metric", "aggs": [{"id": "1", "enabled": true, "type": "cardinality", "schema": "metric", "params": {"field": "ai.destination_ip.keyword"}}], "params": {"addTooltip": false, "addLegend": false, "percentageMode": "none", "style": {"bgColor": true, "bgFill": "#FDECEC", "fontSize": "18pt", "labelColor": {"mode": "text"}, "subText": "条确认攻击", "color": "#E74C3C"}, "useColors": false}}

attributes.title: 攻击源IP数
attributes.visState: {"title": "攻击源IP数", "type": "metric", "aggs": [{"id": "1", "enabled": true, "type": "cardinality", "schema": "metric", "params": {"field": "ai.source_ip.keyword"}}], "params": {"addTooltip": false, "addLegend": false, "style": {"bgColor": true, "bgFill": "#FEF5E7", "fontSize": "18pt", "labelColor": {"mode": "text"}, "subText": "独立源IP", "color": "#D35400"}, "useColors": false}}

attributes.title: 平均可信度
attributes.visState: {"title": "平均可信度", "type": "metric", "aggs": [{"id": "1", "enabled": true, "type": "avg", "schema": "metric", "params": {"field": "ai.confidence"}}], "params": {"addTooltip": false, "addLegend": false, "style": {"bgColor": true, "bgFill": "#EAFAF1", "fontSize": "18pt", "labelColor": {"mode": "text"}, "subText": "/100", "color": "#1E8449"}, "useColors": false}}

attributes.title: SOC攻击分类分布
attributes.visState: {"title": "SOC攻击分类分布", "type": "horizontal_bar", "aggs": [{"id": "1", "enabled": true, "type": "count", "schema": "metric", "params": {}}, {"id": "2", "enabled": true, "type": "terms", "schema": "segment", "params": {"field": "ai.soc_name.keyword", "size": 10, "order": "desc", "orderBy": "1"}}], "params": {"type": "horizontal_bar", "addTooltip": true, "addLegend": false, "grid": {"categoryLines": false}, "valueAxes": [{"id": "ValueAxis-1", "name": "Values", "type": "value", "position": "bottom", "scale": {"type": "linear"}, "labels": {"show": true}, "title": {"text": ""}}], "categoryAxes": [{"id": "CategoryAxis-1", "type": "category", "position": "left", "scale": {"type": "linear"}, "labels": {"show": true}, "title": {}}], "seriesParams": [{"data": {"id": "1", "label": "Count"}, "drawLinesBetweenPoints": true, "mode": "normal", "setYExtents": false, "show": true, "sizeRatio": 1, "type": "histogram", "valueAxis": "ValueAxis-1"}], "labels": {"show": true}}}

attributes.title: 威胁判定分布
attributes.visState: {"title": "威胁判定分布", "type": "pie", "aggs": [{"id": "1", "enabled": true, "type": "count", "schema": "metric", "params": {}}, {"id": "2", "enabled": true, "type": "terms", "schema": "segment", "params": {"field": "ai.threat_verdict.keyword", "size": 10, "order": "desc", "orderBy": "1"}}], "params": {"type": "pie", "addTooltip": true, "addLegend": true, "legendPosition": "right", "isDonut": true, "labels": {"show": true, "values": true}}}

attributes.title: 攻击结果分布
attributes.visState: {"title": "攻击结果分布", "type": "pie", "aggs": [{"id": "1", "enabled": true, "type": "count", "schema": "metric", "params": {}}, {"id": "2", "enabled": true, "type": "terms", "schema": "segment", "params": {"field": "ai.attack_result.keyword", "size": 10, "order": "desc", "orderBy": "1"}}], "params": {"type": "pie", "addTooltip": true, "addLegend": true, "legendPosition": "right", "isDonut": true, "labels": {"show": true, "values": true}}}
